title: Neuroanatomy
description: The course systematically explains the structure and function of the nervous system. In our neuroanatomy class, you will study a broad range of the relevant knowledge, including brain structure and function, spinal cord, cranial nerves, spinal nerves, nervous pathways and cerebral vascular, which is fundamental to the practice of clinical neuroscience and neurosurgery. What you will learn in this course will guide you and inspire you to explore the mysteries of our human body!
